prompt: Get detailed information about the video E:\Private\skill开发\ffmpeg-video-workspace\test-files\test_input.mp4 using get_video_info and write the result as JSON to E:\Private\skill开发\ffmpeg-video-workspace\iteration-1\eval-video-info\with_skill\outputs\info.json. Use the FFmpeg Python wrapper from E:\Private\skill开发\ffmpeg-skill\ (the package is named 'ffmpeg-skill' and you need to import it via importlib: import importlib, sys; sys.path.insert(0, r'E:\Private\skill开发'); mod = importlib.import_module('ffmpeg-skill'); FFmpegSkill = mod.FFmpegSkill). Format the JSON with indent=2.

assertions.name: info-json-exists
assertions.description: JSON output file exists and is parseable

assertions.name: info-contains-duration
assertions.description: JSON contains a valid duration field (> 0)

assertions.name: info-contains-resolution
assertions.description: JSON contains nonzero width and height fields

assertions.name: info-contains-codec
assertions.description: JSON contains a non-empty codec field

assertions.name: info-contains-fps
assertions.description: JSON contains a valid fps field (> 0)
